problems.label: Sound familiar?
problems.title: If even one of these resonates with you —
problems.item1: You know what you should do — but you keep sabotaging yourself
problems.item2: Anxiety or fear controls your decisions
problems.item3: You repeat the same patterns in relationships or work
problems.item4: You procrastinate even when the deadline is on fire
problems.item5: You can't get rid of intrusive thoughts or habits
problems.item6: You feel like you're living someone else's life

stats.reason1Text: You remain fully conscious and in control. No suggestions against your will — only what you yourself want to change.
stats.reason2Text: 1–3 sessions instead of years of therapy. We work on the root cause, not the symptom. No results — full refund.
stats.reason3Text: Every session is built around your specific request. No templates — only work tailored to your unique situation.

faq.label: Common questions
faq.title: Addressing your concerns
faq.q1: Can you get stuck in hypnosis or lose control?
faq.a1: No. Hypnosis is not sleep or loss of consciousness. You remain fully aware and can exit the trance at any moment. It's more like deep relaxation with focus.
faq.q2: How many sessions are needed to see results?
faq.a2: Most clients notice tangible changes after just 1–2 sessions. Deeper transformation typically happens over 3–6 sessions, depending on the issue.
faq.q3: What if I can't be hypnotised?
faq.a3: Everyone can be hypnotised — it's only a question of depth. Even a light trance is sufficient for working with subconscious programs.
faq.q4: Are online sessions as effective as in-person?
faq.a4: Yes. Online sessions are just as effective. All you need is a quiet space and headphones. Thousands of clients worldwide get excellent results online.
faq.q5: What if I don't get results?
faq.a5: I offer a 100% results guarantee. If you don't feel a change after the session — I'll refund you in full, no questions asked.

cta.title: Ready for change?
cta.descCont: — and I'll personally walk through your situation in a free 30-minute consultation.
cta.footer: I respond within an hour · No commitment
